Title: Misc Quests
SubTitle: Miscellaneous quests and rare mobs.
Acolyte of Bristlebane:
**Quest Name:** Acolyte of Bristlebane  
*(Fan Fair Quest)*  
**Level:** 51–60  
**Class:** All  
**NPC:** Acolyte of Bristlebane  
**Location:** Bobble-by-Water, near coach  

---

### 🔷 [Blue Gem]

**1.** Talk to **Acolyte of Bristlebane**, he is in **BBW near the coach**. He tells you about the **Staff of Rainbow Magic** and that it has been shattered and enlists you to help him. He sends you to **Gil Swimmerbee** in **Vastly Deep (W)** — Gil is in a boat next to a dock.  

**2.** **Gil Swimmerbee** tells you that he lost his gem and needs a breathing device made. He sends you to **Anu Village** to speak to **Steely Stoutdale** — located outside along the west wall of Anu village.  

**3.** **Steely Stoutdale** will build the breathing apparatus if you bring him the **Mask of the Sly Ice Giant**. To find this Sly Ice Giant, head straight **Northwest** from Steely, over the dark patch of ice, and you'll reach small hills. In the valley between these hills he will spawn (triggered). Easy to kill at level 60. Kill, then return to Steely with the mask.  

**4.** Steely Stoutdale gives you a **breath potion** and sends you back to **Gil Swimmerbee**. Get **3,000 tunar**.  

**5.** Gil Swimmerbee sends you to **Ks'or**. Be sure to have **3,000 tunar** on you before you use your breath potion! Swim out and down to the bottom of **Vastly Deep** until you reach some underwater ruins. Look for a merman named **Ks'or**, surrounded by **mermaids (CONs LB)**. They are not too hard to kill.  

**6.** Ks'or takes your **3,000 tunar** for the gem and sends you back to **Gil Swimmerbee**, who sends you back to **Steely Stoutdale**.  
***Note:*** You can skip going back to Steely and go directly to **Gemmaster Thoren** in **Moradhim**.  

**7.** Steely Stoutdale wants the gem cleaned, and sends you to **Gemmaster Thoren** — located outside **Moradhim**, west of the coach by a tree. Thoren wants **1,500 tunar** to polish the gem. Return to **Acolyte of Bristlebane** and receive **20 million XP**.  

---

### 🟩 [Green Gem]

**8.** Acolyte of Bristlebane sends you to find **Mixoxullous** in **Murnf**, just southeast of the coach.  

**9.** Mixoxullous tells you of the power of the green gem and that you must defeat **Creepyman** to free **Baylor (CONs Yel to 51)**.  
To find Creepyman: go to **Salisearaneen (W)**, a bit northwest of a centaur camp, in a patch of trees. On the road there is a glowing stone, a fallen log, and a signpost “**The Golden Road**.” Creepyman spawns directly southwest of this signpost. He may be delayed and roams. Once spawned, multiple players can talk to him.  
Kill **Creepyman**, then talk to **Baylor**.  

**10.** Baylor tells you he gave the gem to **Oppydna**, found directly east and slightly north in **Salisearaneen (C)** at the base of a hill near some trees. He wants **3,500 tunar** for the gem. Return to **Acolyte of Bristlebane** and receive **20 million XP**.  

---

### 🔴 [Red Gem]

**11.** Acolyte of Bristlebane sends you to **Leeanna**, located just north of **Wyndhaven** on the shore. She gives you a pair of **Gloves of No Ouchies**. Equip them and head to **Mt. Hatespike** (Bloodfoot camp, lower level).  
You will get a popup near the **Blacksmith**, on a small ledge facing the lava. The ledge is to the left if you’re looking across the little bridge. You’ll receive the **Scorched Red Gem**. Return to Leeanna.  

**12.** Leeanna sends you to **High Druid Postmanjim** in **Qeynos**, outside the south wall near a tree. He tells you to talk to **High Shaman Bradue**, who is also in Qeynos along the outside of the west wall corner.  

**13.** High Shaman Bradue sends you to find an **Icy Vial**, which drops from **TFGs**. Kill until it drops (decent rate). Return to Bradue.  

**14.** Bradue sends you to buy a **polishing cloth** from **High Sorcerer Coolade** in **Kelinar** (south side near tents). Pay him **2,000** first, then **10,000** — for a total of **12,000 tunar**. Return to **High Druid Postmanjim**.  

**15.** Postmanjim sends you back to **Leeanna**. Return to **Acolyte of Bristlebane** for **20 million XP**.  

---

### 🟨 [Yellow Gem]

**16.** Acolyte of Bristlebane sends you to seek out the last known owners of the Yellow Gem — **Sunshine and Beam Brightray** in **Merry-By-Water (C)**, southern portion of town.  

They tell you they divided the gem’s power among their four children, who were later captured by a dark necromancer using “star-magic.”  

Find four (4) popups on **starfish** located on shores in:  
1) **Erud’s Crossing (SW)**  
2) **Kerra Isle (C)/(S)**  
3) **Kerra Isle (W)/(S)**  
4) **West Toxx (E)/(SE)**  

Return to **Sunshine and Beam Brightray**, then to **Acolyte of Bristlebane** for **20 million XP**.  

---

### 💎 [Gem of Nykitas]

**17.** Acolyte of Bristlebane sends you to **LSM** to talk to **Blacksmith Kadeshi**, who is held captive by **Fire Goblins** in **LSM (NW)** near the Goblin Fort. Kill goblins until you loot **“an oddly shaped key.”** Return to Kadeshi.  

**18.** Kadeshi says the **Gem of Nykitas** is held by **Xalakharx** in **Geomancer’s Pass (W)** at the first **Spectral Rallosian cave**.  

**19.** Xalakharx wants **10,000 tunar** and says a **Spectral Warlord** has the gem. Kill placeholders until a **named Warlord** spawns, kill, loot gem, return to Xalakharx.  

**20.** Xalakharx assembles the gem into the **Staff of Rainbow Magic**. Return to **Acolyte of Bristlebane** for **20 million XP**.  

---

### ⚙️ [Handle]

**21.** Acolyte of Bristlebane** sends you to find the handle for the staff in **Lake Rathe (E)** on one of the islands with necro birds. You’ll receive a popup at the top of the island, spawning the **Rainbow Magic Guardian**. Kill it and loot **Unraveled Hand Grip** (drops four).  

**22.** After you kill the dragon, a **Tree of Life** appears on the same island. Talk to it for your reward — **30 million XP** and a **class-specific item**.  

---
